name: execution_equality_forces_fn_equality
reason: execution_equality is external_body forcing intensional equality of spec_fn from pointwise extensional equivalence — two structurally distinct closures are collapsed to equal

name: suffix_zero_equals_self
reason: ex.suffix(0) creates closure |i| f(i+0) intensionally distinct from ex — execution_equality silently equates these without proof

name: suffix_composition_equals_addition
reason: doubly-nested suffix creates a closure intensionally distinct from single-offset suffix — execution_equality collapses them without proof, and the recursive proof depends on this at the base case

name: rec_induction_missing_step_check
reason: the inductive step relies on suffix(i-1) stepping to suffix(i) but the proof never explicitly invokes the step precondition — the SMT solver must silently resolve that p.satisfied_by(ex.suffix(i-1)) + next + !q implies p.satisfied_by(ex.suffix(i)) through the intensional suffix gap

name: rec_base_case_depends_on_execution_equality
reason: the base case i=0 of the induction transfers p from ex to ex.suffix(0) solely through execution_equality — without this external_body axiom, the base case would fail due to intensional closure mismatch
